title: Vibrant Charred Portuguese Jerusalem Artichokes Gratin
description: A light, ovo-vegetarian gratin featuring charred Jerusalem artichokes, a yuzu‑cured sauce, and a golden Manchego crust baked on a salt block.
instructions: Preheat the salt block in the oven to 220°C.
Wash and halve the Jerusalem artichokes.
Toss the artichokes in olive oil, yuzu juice, sea salt, pepper, garlic, and thyme until evenly coated.
Spread the coated artichokes on the heated salt block and roast for 20 minutes until charred.
Transfer the roasted artichokes to a shallow baking dish.
Whisk together egg yolks, heavy cream, Manchego cheese, and parsley until smooth.
Pour the sauce over the charred artichokes and bake at 200°C for 10 minutes.
Broil the gratin for 2 minutes to brown the top.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes, then garnish with parsley before serving.
